title: Is there any mutation to change the defaults (options) of a status column?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I can’t find anything in the documentation to update the default options of a status column, I see here in the create_column mutation you can set the defaults, but is there any way to update the value of an…

posts.author: gigo6000 (Carlos Mafla)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I can’t find anything in the documentation to update the default options of a status column, I see here in the create_column mutation you can set the defaults, but is there any way to update the value of an existing column?

Any advice is appreciated, thanks!

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: You can’t set the default labels of a status column through the API. You can add labels, but not delete them.
